name: ai-zippy/oem-information
title: OEM Information
description: A CTA block for OEM/ODM partnership information with heading, description, and contact button.

body.default: Partner with us to bring innovative beauty and wellness technology to your brand. Our OEM/ODM solutions allow businesses to develop and market high-quality devices under their own branding, supported by patented technology, proven results, and reliable manufacturing expertise. Whether you are looking to expand your product line or launch a new beauty technology brand, we provide the support needed to turn your vision into market-ready solutions.

buttonText.default: Get in touch with us to explore OEM/ODM opportunities and reseller partnerships.
